Description: Zipped archive containing Python drivers, analysis scripts, and Slurm configuration files for all six PT-JPL-SM-OWUS model variants.
Usage in Manuscript: Core model code used to run empirical and analytical SPAC simulations.

Description: Zipped archive containing LaTeX source equations for the model structures (v3.2.1, v3.2.1.1, v12.3.1, and v13.3.1).
Usage in Manuscript: Mathematical proofs and model structural descriptions included in paper appendices.

Description: Site-by-site outputs for the empirical MultiPET v3.2.1 version, which replaces standard canopy-height stress equations with a linear OWUS constraint.
Usage in Manuscript: Baseline empirical Multi-PET evaluations across the site network.

Description: Site-by-site outputs for the analytical MultiPET v3.2.1.1 version, which replaces piecewise linear thresholds with a full sigmoidal SPAC solution.
Site-level outputs for Single-PET v12.3.1, incorporating dynamic parameter multipliers (via K-Means clustering) and multiple shape functions (Linear, Exp, Sigmoid).
Site-level outputs for Single-PET v12.3.1.1, combining dynamic regime clustering with the analytical sigmoidal SPAC solver.
Site-level outputs for Single-PET v13.3.1, which generalizes the stress proxy using Vegetation Optical Depth (VOD_C and VOD_L) alongside soil moisture.
Usage in Manuscript: VOD proxy and multi-sensor constraint evaluations.

Description: Site-level outputs for Single-PET v13.3.1.1, representing the ultimate generalized, dynamic, analytical SPAC-constrained PT-JPL model.
